name: rust-cli-apps
description: Portable workflows for designing stable Rust CLI applications and safely developing commands in existing CLIs.

interface.shortDescription: Design portable Rust CLIs and evolve commands safely.
interface.longDescription: Portable workflows for designing stable Rust CLI applications and safely developing commands in existing CLIs.
defaultPrompt: Use $rust-cli-application-design to design or review a portable, stable Rust command-line application.
Use $rust-cli-command-development to add or change one command in this existing Rust CLI.
